close_drawer.P2: grasp the drawer handle, then close it
close_drawer.P3: Gently push the handle of the wooden cabinet drawer until it is completely shut.

open_drawer.P2: grasp the drawer handle and open it
open_drawer.P3: Carefully pull the metal handle to slide the drawer open completely.

move_slider_left.P1: slide the door to the left
move_slider_left.P2: grasp the door handle, then move the door to the left
move_slider_left.P3: Firmly grasp the handle and quickly slide the cabinet door all the way to the left side.

move_slider_right.P1: slide the door to the right
move_slider_right.P2: grasp the door handle and move the door to the right
move_slider_right.P3: Firmly grasp the handle and quickly slide the cabinet door all the way to the right side.

turn_on_led.P2: push down the button to turn on the green light
turn_on_led.P3: Reach out and firmly press the small button to turn on the bright green LED.

turn_off_led.P2: toggle the button to turn off the green light
turn_off_led.P3: Reach out and firmly press the small button to shut off the bright green LED.

turn_on_lightbulb.P2: move the light switch to turn on the yellow light
turn_on_lightbulb.P3: Carefully flip the physical switch upwards to illuminate the yellow lightbulb.

turn_off_lightbulb.P2: toggle the light switch to turn off the yellow light
turn_off_lightbulb.P3: Carefully flip the physical switch downwards to darken the yellow lightbulb.

lift_blue_block_drawer.P1: pick up the blue block from the drawer
lift_blue_block_drawer.P2: go towards the blue block in the drawer and grasp it
lift_blue_block_drawer.P3: Gently reach into the wooden drawer and carefully lift up the small blue block.
lift_blue_block_drawer.P4: Pick up the block from the drawer.

lift_pink_block_drawer.P1: pick up the pink block from the drawer
lift_pink_block_drawer.P2: go towards the pink block in the drawer and grasp it
lift_pink_block_drawer.P3: Gently reach into the wooden drawer and carefully lift up the small pink block.
lift_pink_block_drawer.P4: Pick up the block from the drawer.

lift_red_block_drawer.P1: pick up the red block from the drawer
lift_red_block_drawer.P2: go towards the red block in the drawer and grasp it
lift_red_block_drawer.P3: Gently reach into the wooden drawer and carefully lift up the small red block.
lift_red_block_drawer.P4: Pick up the block from the drawer.

lift_blue_block_slider.P1: pick up the blue block from the sliding cabinet
lift_blue_block_slider.P2: in the sliding cabinet grasp the blue block
lift_blue_block_slider.P3: Carefully reach into the sliding cabinet compartment and grab the small blue block.
lift_blue_block_slider.P4: Lift the block in the cabinet.

lift_pink_block_slider.P1: pick up the pink block from the sliding cabinet
lift_pink_block_slider.P2: in the sliding cabinet grasp the pink block
lift_pink_block_slider.P3: Carefully reach into the sliding cabinet compartment and grab the small pink block.
lift_pink_block_slider.P4: Lift the block in the cabinet.

lift_red_block_slider.P1: pick up the red block from the sliding cabinet
lift_red_block_slider.P2: in the sliding cabinet grasp the red block
lift_red_block_slider.P3: Carefully reach into the sliding cabinet compartment and grab the small red block.
lift_red_block_slider.P4: Lift the block in the cabinet.

lift_blue_block_table.P2: grasp the blue block on the table and lift it up
lift_blue_block_table.P3: Smoothly grasp the small blue block resting on the flat table and lift it straight up.
lift_blue_block_table.P4: Lift a block from the table.

lift_pink_block_table.P2: grasp the pink block on the table and lift it up
lift_pink_block_table.P3: Smoothly grasp the small pink block resting on the flat table and lift it straight up.
lift_pink_block_table.P4: Lift a block from the table.

lift_red_block_table.P2: grasp the red block on the table and lift it up
lift_red_block_table.P3: Smoothly grasp the small red block resting on the flat table and lift it straight up.
lift_red_block_table.P4: Lift a block from the table.

push_blue_block_left.P1: slide the blue block to the left
push_blue_block_left.P2: go push the blue block to the left
push_blue_block_left.P3: Carefully nudge the small blue block over toward the left side of the workspace.

push_pink_block_left.P1: slide the pink block to the left
push_pink_block_left.P2: go push the pink block to the left
push_pink_block_left.P3: Carefully nudge the small pink block over toward the left side of the workspace.

push_red_block_left.P1: slide the red block to the left
push_red_block_left.P2: go push the red block to the left
push_red_block_left.P3: Carefully nudge the small red block over toward the left side of the workspace.

push_blue_block_right.P1: slide the blue block to the right
push_blue_block_right.P2: go slide the blue block to the right
push_blue_block_right.P3: Gently sweep the small blue block over toward the right side of the desk.

push_pink_block_right.P1: slide the pink block to the right
push_pink_block_right.P2: go slide the pink block to the right
push_pink_block_right.P3: Gently sweep the small pink block over toward the right side of the desk.

push_red_block_right.P1: slide the red block to the right
push_red_block_right.P2: go slide the red block to the right
push_red_block_right.P3: Gently sweep the small red block over toward the right side of the desk.

rotate_blue_block_left.P2: take the blue block and rotate it left
rotate_blue_block_left.P3: Firmly grip the blue block and twist it exactly 90 degrees counter-clockwise.
rotate_blue_block_left.P4: Rotate a block to the left.

rotate_pink_block_left.P2: take the pink block and rotate it left
rotate_pink_block_left.P3: Firmly grip the pink block and twist it exactly 90 degrees counter-clockwise.
rotate_pink_block_left.P4: Rotate a block to the left.

rotate_red_block_left.P2: take the red block and rotate it left
rotate_red_block_left.P3: Firmly grip the red block and twist it exactly 90 degrees counter-clockwise.
rotate_red_block_left.P4: Rotate a block to the left.

rotate_blue_block_right.P2: grasp the blue block, then rotate it right
rotate_blue_block_right.P3: Firmly grip the blue block and twist it exactly 90 degrees clockwise.

rotate_pink_block_right.P2: grasp the pink block, then rotate it right
rotate_pink_block_right.P3: Firmly grip the pink block and twist it exactly 90 degrees clockwise.

rotate_red_block_right.P2: grasp the red block, then rotate it right
rotate_red_block_right.P3: Firmly grip the red block and twist it exactly 90 degrees clockwise.

place_in_drawer.P1: store the object in the drawer
place_in_drawer.P2: move to the drawer and place the object
place_in_drawer.P3: Carefully lower the currently grasped item right into the center of the open drawer.

place_in_slider.P1: put the object in the sliding cabinet
place_in_slider.P2: place the grasped object in the slider
place_in_slider.P3: Gently set the item you are holding down inside the sliding cabinet.

push_into_drawer.P1: slide the block into the drawer
push_into_drawer.P2: push the object that it falls into the drawer
push_into_drawer.P3: Quickly shove the block so that it tumbles directly into the open drawer.

stack_block.P1: put the block on top of another block
stack_block.P2: place the grasped block on top of another block
stack_block.P3: Very carefully balance the block you are holding directly onto the top of the stationary block.

unstack_block.P2: go to the tower of blocks and take off the top one
unstack_block.P3: Gently dismantle the tower by lifting the uppermost block off of the bottom one.
